name: logistics supervisors at freight brokers managing 5–15 deliveries/day tool
description: For logistics supervisors at freight brokers processing 5–15 deliveries/day, route deviations cause late deliveries. We monitor GPS data instead of manual tracking of delivery routes.
target_audience: logistics supervisors at freight brokers managing 5–15 deliveries/day
problem_solved: route deviations leading to late deliveries
